---
title: "All Games"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell hub-shell">
  <section class="hub-hero">
    <p class="archive-eyebrow">Game Library</p>
    <h1>All Games</h1>
    <p class="hub-lead">
      A growing set of simple daily games and fact-driven puzzles. For now, the Mongolia streak
      game is live and the rest of the slots are ready for future additions.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="hub-grid">
    <a class="game-tile game-tile-live" href="index.html">
      <p class="game-tile-label">Live now</p>
      <h2>Mongolia 100</h2>
      <p class="game-tile-copy">
        Build a streak by answering Mongolia fact cards without repeats inside a cycle.
      </p>
      <div class="game-tile-meta">
        <span>100 facts</span>
        <span>Streak mode</span>
        <span>Daily play</span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <article class="game-tile game-tile-soon">
      <p class="game-tile-label">Coming soon</p>
      <h2>Next Geography Game</h2>
      <p class="game-tile-copy">
        Placeholder slot for another country or region-based daily challenge.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="game-tile game-tile-soon">
      <p class="game-tile-label">Coming soon</p>
      <h2>History Sprint</h2>
      <p class="game-tile-copy">
        Placeholder slot for a future timeline or historical fact guessing game.
      </p>
    </article>

    <article class="game-tile game-tile-soon">
      <p class="game-tile-label">Coming soon</p>
      <h2>Culture Stack</h2>
      <p class="game-tile-copy">
        Placeholder slot for a future culture and traditions quiz format.
      </p>
    </article>
  </section>
</div>
```
